qa_pairs.question: What was the impact on Cedar cluster services during the planned outage from March 31 to April 2, 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: From March 31 to April 2, 2025, the Cedar cluster was completely unavailable for power modifications, meaning users could not log in or run jobs, and any running jobs were terminated. However, Cedar Cloud remained operational during this period.

qa_pairs.question: Which systems and services were affected by the complete shutdown at the SciNet Datacenter on November 7-8, 2024?
qa_pairs.answer: From 7 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET on November 7-8, 2024, all systems and storage at the SciNet Datacenter were unavailable. This included Niagara, Mist, HPSS, Rouge, Teach, JupyterHub, and Balam, due to the installation of new electrical equipment (UPS).

qa_pairs.question: What was the status of Graham cluster services, storage, and cloud during the extensive data centre shutdown that began on December 7, 2024?
qa_pairs.answer: Beginning December 7, 2024, all Graham cluster services, storage, and cloud services were entirely unavailable due to a complete data centre shutdown for renovations. This outage, initially scheduled until January 3, 2025, was extended to February 24, 2025.
